The '''Nubian Palace''' was the most well-known resort on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]]. Inside the resort was twelve different [[Casino/Legends|casinos]], four [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] theaters, a [[virtual reality]] suite, and the [[Solar Gardens]]. It was very luxurious and large, but unbeknownst to most of its customers, the Nubian Palace was actually the base of operations for [[Prall (Hutt)|Prall]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].
